name: Old Fashioned
description: A timeless classic — bourbon, bitters, and a whisper of sweetness
steps: Place sugar cube in glass and saturate with bitters
Add a splash of water and muddle until dissolved
Fill glass with a large ice cube
Pour bourbon over ice and stir gently for 30 seconds
Express orange peel over glass and garnish

name: Negroni
description: Bold, complex, and perfectly balanced — a bartender handshake
steps: Combine gin, Campari, and vermouth in a mixing glass
Add ice and stir for 30 seconds
Strain into a rocks glass over a large ice cube
Garnish with an orange peel

name: Mojito
description: Fresh mint, lime, and rum — the taste of a Caribbean afternoon
steps: Muddle mint leaves with sugar and lime juice
Add rum and fill glass with crushed ice
Top with soda water and stir gently
Garnish with mint sprig and lime wedge

name: Margarita
description: The quintessential tequila cocktail — bright, tangy, and refreshing
steps: Salt the rim of a chilled glass
Combine tequila, lime juice, and triple sec in a shaker
Add ice and shake vigorously for 15 seconds
Strain into glass over fresh ice
Garnish with lime wheel

name: Espresso Martini
description: Coffee, vodka, and sophistication in one chilled glass
steps: Pull a fresh espresso shot and let cool slightly
Combine vodka, coffee liqueur, espresso, and syrup in shaker
Add ice and shake hard for 20 seconds to create foam
Double strain into a chilled martini glass
Garnish with 3 coffee beans

name: Aperol Spritz
description: The Italian aperitivo — sunshine in a glass
steps: Fill a large wine glass with ice
Add Aperol then Prosecco
Top with a splash of soda water
Stir gently once
Garnish with orange slice

name: Dark and Stormy
description: Spicy ginger beer and dark rum — a storm worth welcoming
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice
Add lime juice
Pour ginger beer
Float dark rum on top by pouring over back of spoon
Garnish with lime wedge

name: Whiskey Sour
description: The perfect balance of bourbon, citrus, and sweetness
steps: Dry shake all ingredients without ice for 15 seconds
Add ice and shake hard for another 15 seconds
Strain into a rocks glass over ice
Add a few drops of bitters on foam
Garnish with lemon wheel and cherry

name: Virgin Mojito
description: All the freshness of a mojito, zero alcohol
steps: Muddle mint with sugar and lime juice in a glass
Fill glass with crushed ice
Top with soda water and stir gently
Garnish with mint sprig and lime wedge

name: Detroit Sour
description: A signature creation — house-made sour mix with velvet egg white foam
steps: Combine all ingredients in shaker without ice and dry shake 15 seconds
Add ice and shake vigorously for 20 seconds
Double strain into coupe glass
Garnish with lemon peel and smoked cherry
